title: Best Supporting Actress at the 2026 Golden Globes
text: Motion Picture Category: Winner: Teyana Taylor (One Battle After Another). The other nominees were: Emily Blunt (The Smashing Machine), Elle Fanning (Sentimental Value), Ariana Grande (Wicked: For Good), Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas (Sentimental Value), Amy Madigan (Weapons). Television Category: Winner: Erin Doherty (Adolescence). The ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, and was hosted by Nikki Glaser for the second consecutive year.
